ai_summary: Alkem Laboratories reported strong underlying Q1 FY2019 performance, with adjusted year-on-year growth exceeding 40% in both India and US segments, alongside a positive US FDA inspection resolution for its Daman facility. Reported revenue and EBITDA margins were artificially lower due to a domestic distribution policy change, and sequential US growth was flat due to fewer launches, but full-year launch guidance remains intact. The company also highlighted its chronic business becoming profitable, indicating positive strategic execution despite these quarter-specific adjustments and market headwinds.
